theScene: You exit the switch room and head back into the frigid blizzard of Aiko's room, shivering as you quickly trek back to the rest point room as fast as you possible can...
As you take a deep breath prepare to head back into the frigid domain of Aiko, Kotone suddenly surprises you by popping into the chamber from a hidden door in the wall just next to you.

Congratulations!♪ You have now officially cleared all of the will trials! Please, follow me back to the entrance. It's much warmer this way, and I promise that I won't play any tricks on you... This time.♪

Deciding that anything is better than having to trudge through the frigid hellscape that is Aiko's room, you follow Kotone through a set of winding hidden passageways until you're suddenly back at the entrance of the will trials, and Kotone walks over to the fox door and opens it before turning back to you with a sly grin.
Feel free to try the trials again if you want, and know that this time it'll just be for fun.♪ Good luck with the rest of the dungeon, and be careful with the final boss fight.♪ Fufu...
She closes the door behind her with a giggle, leaving you to decide what you want to do next.

The large, intricately designed silver door to your right draws your attention, and the words 'Trials of Will' are engraved on the wall just above it. There's a small door directly in front of you on the other side of the room that has a stylized fox mask hanging off a hook, and the open doorway back to the main hall is behind you, giving you a view not only of the main hall, but the red room on the other side of the dungeon as well.
As you take a deep breath prepare to head back into the frigid domain of Aiko, Kotone suddenly surprises you by popping into the chamber from a hidden door in the wall just next to you.

Oh, and I know that I've mentioned this to you before, but you're welcome to try any of the trials again if you want, they'll just be for fun this time.♪ Fufu...
